audience.zh: 首次访问 SaaS 价格页的买家

problem.en: Visitors cannot understand the difference between Basic and Pro.
problem.zh: 用户看不懂 Basic 和 Pro 的差异。

signalExamples.en: I do not understand the difference between Basic and Pro.
signalExamples.zh: 我看不懂基础版和专业版差在哪。

signalExamples.en: I am a developer and only care about the API.
signalExamples.zh: 我是开发者，我只关心 API。

evalGate.en: Allowed: copy, layout, CTA text. Blocked: pricing amount and payment logic.
evalGate.zh: 允许：文案、布局、CTA。阻止：价格金额和支付逻辑。

detail.en: Pricing confusion repeats across new-user feedback.
detail.zh: 新用户反馈反复出现价格页理解阻塞。

detail.en: Clear plan comparison should increase signup intent.
detail.zh: 更清晰的套餐对比应提升注册意图。

detail.en: Only pricing hero copy and layout are allowed.
detail.zh: 只允许修改价格页首屏文案和布局。

detail.en: New users can receive the clarity branch with rollback available.
detail.zh: 新用户可看到清晰度分支，并保留回滚能力。
